_comment: Windows-only PowerShell variant of settings.json. Use when bash (git-bash) is not available. Copy to settings.json (team-wide) or settings.local.json (per-developer). Uses Windows PowerShell 5.1 (preinstalled on every Windows machine) — no extra install required. PowerShell 7 (pwsh) also works; swap 'powershell' for 'pwsh' if preferred.
